title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at VRL Logistics

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at VRL Logistics
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VRL Logistics. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About VRL Logistics:
VRL Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VRL Logistics!
